name: welcome-messages
description: Holiday + themed greetings shown above the YHA hero in the empty-chat state. Owns 28 .md banks under data/ (any-day generics + each holiday) and the /v1/greetings + /v1/greetings/reload routes. Disabling the module makes the empty-chat state fall back to the frontend's static default greeting (plan §4.1 — disabling welcome-messages is not a blank-screen trap).
